issues.description: GiveDon action is incomplete. The card text states 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it'. This requires: (1) SearchDeck to find DON!! card, (2) AttachDon to attach it, (3) Rest to rest the attached DON!!. Current DSL only has GiveDon which does not match the effect.
Duplicate 'Trigger' effect with only GiveDon is unexplained and appears to be an error. The card text does not support a secondary trigger effect.
Rest action target should include maxCost constraint. Current target specification 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxCost:2 is correct, but the implementation is incomplete for the full effect chain.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less, and add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
